spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE retry_count > 0)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS retry_rate
FROM print_jobs
WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('day', NOW())

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status= 'ONLINE')
FROM printers

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status= 'OFFLINE')
FROM printers

SELECT  
  p.name ,
  COUNT(pj.id) AS job_count
FROM print_jobs pj
JOIN printers p ON p.id = pj.printer_id
WHERE pj.created_at >= date_trunc('day',NOW())
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY job_count DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  p.name,
  COUNT(pj.id) AS jobs
FROM
  printers p
  JOIN print_jobs pj ON pj.printer_id = p.id
WHERE
  pj.created_at >= date_trunc('day', NOW())
GROUP BY
  p.id,
  p.name
ORDER BY
  jobs DESC

SELECT 
  date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'COMPLETED') AS completed_jobs,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED') AS failed_jobs
FROM print_jobs
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

spec.title: Completed VS failed jobs over time

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
  date_trunc('hour', pj.created_at) AS time,
  p.name AS printer,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
    SELECT MAX(je.created_at) - MIN(je.created_at)
    FROM job_events je
    WHERE je.job_id = pj.id AND  je.event_type != 'SCHEDULED'
  ))) AS avg_duration_seconds
FROM print_jobs pj
JOIN printers p ON p.id = pj.printer_id
WHERE pj.status = 'COMPLETED'
  AND pj.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT 
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - last_seen)) AS seconds_since_last_seen
FROM worker_heartbeat
WHERE worker_id = 'worker-1'

spec.description: Time since the last heartbeat of the PDF processing pipeline
spec.title: Pipelne Worker - Last Seen

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN NOW() - last_seen < INTERVAL '1 minute' THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS healthy
FROM worker_heartbeat

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM print_jobs
WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('day', NOW())

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'COMPLETED')::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)
FROM print_jobs 
WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('day', NOW()) 
AND status NOT IN ('QUEUED', 'SCHEDULED', 'CANCELLED', 'PROCESSING', 'PRINTING')

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED')
FROM print_jobs 
WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('day', NOW());

WITH completed_jobs_today AS (
  SELECT pj.id AS job_id
  FROM print_jobs pj
  WHERE pj.created_at >= date_trunc('day', NOW())
  AND pj.status = 'COMPLETED'
),
jobs_duration AS (
  SELECT 
    je.job_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM MAX(je.created_at) - MIN(je.created_at)) AS job_duration_seconds
  FROM job_events je
  JOIN completed_jobs_today cjt ON cjt.job_id = je.job_id
  WHERE je.event_type NOT IN ('SCHEDULED', 'RETRY')
  GROUP BY je.job_id
)
SELECT 
  AVG(job_duration_seconds) AS avg_job_duration_seconds
FROM jobs_duration

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'QUEUED')
  + COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'SCHEDULED' AND scheduled_at <= NOW()) AS queue_depth
FROM print_jobs
